en.summary: Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari asked the Prophet Muhammad (SAWW) about his successor. After ten days of silence, the Prophet explained he was awaiting divine revelation. Jibreel then brought the message from Allah that Ali ibn Abi Talib is the Prophet's executor, successor over his family and nation, protector of the Pool (al-Hawdh), and bearer of his standard into Paradise. The Prophet affirmed that this appointment demands allegiance, and those who follow Ali will be with the Prophet on the Day of Judgement, while opponents will never reach the Pool.

key_terms.وصيّ: Wasi - executor and successor appointed by divine command
key_terms.خليفة: Khalifah - caliph, representative or successor in authority
key_terms.حوض: Hawdh - the Pool in the afterlife where the Prophet meets his followers
key_terms.لِواء: Liwa - the standard or banner, symbolizing leadership
key_terms.الذائد: Al-Dhaid - the protector who drives away, Ali's role as guardian of the Pool

en.seo_question: What did the Prophet Muhammad say about Ali ibn Abi Talib being his successor when Jabir asked him?

ur.summary: جابر بن عبد اللہ الانصاری نے رسول اللہ سے وصی کے بارے میں پوچھا۔ دس دن کی خاموشی کے بعد جبرئیل نے اللہ کا پیغام لایا کہ علی بن ابی طالب وصی، خلیفہ، حوض کے محافظ اور لواء کے مالک ہیں۔
ur.seo_question: جب جابر نے رسول اللہ سے وصی کے بارے میں پوچھا تو علی کے بارے میں کیا فرمایا؟

tr.summary: Câbir bin Abdullah el-Ensârî, Resulullah'tan vasisi hakkında sordu. On gün sessiz kaldıktan sonra Cebrâîl, Ali bin Ebu Tâlib'in vasi, halife, havuz koruyucusu ve sancak sahibi olduğu mesajını getirdi.
tr.seo_question: Câbir sorduğunda Ali hakkında ne buyurdu?

fa.summary: جابر بن عبدالله انصاری از رسول خدا درباره وصی پرسید. جبرئیل پیام خداوند را آورد که علی بن ابی‌طالب وصی، جانشین، نگهبان حوض و صاحب لوای پیامبر است.
fa.seo_question: وقتی جابر پرسید، پیامبر درباره علی چه فرمود؟

id.summary: Jabir bin Abdullah al-Anshari bertanya kepada Rasulullah tentang penerusnya. Jibril membawa pesan dari Allah bahwa Ali bin Abu Thalib adalah penerus, khalifah, penjaga telaga, dan pemegang bendera Nabi.
id.seo_question: Apa yang dikatakan Nabi tentang Ali sebagai penerusnya ketika Jabir bertanya?

bn.summary: জাবির ইবনে আবদুল্লাহ আল-আনসারি রাসূলুল্লাহকে তাঁর উত্তরাধিকারী সম্পর্কে জিজ্ঞেস করেছিলেন। জিবরাঈল আল্লাহর বার্তা নিয়ে এলেন যে আলী ইবনে আবু তালিব নবীর উত্তরাধিকারী, খলিফা, হাউযের রক্ষক এবং পতাকার বাহক।
bn.seo_question: জাবির যখন নবীকে জিজ্ঞেস করলেন, আলী সম্পর্কে তিনি কী বললেন?

es.summary: Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari preguntó al Profeta sobre su sucesor. Jibreel trajo el mensaje de Dios de que Ali ibn Abi Talib es el ejecutor, sucesor, protector del Estanque y portador del estandarte del Profeta.
es.seo_question: ¿Qué dijo el Profeta sobre Ali como su sucesor cuando Jabir le preguntó?

fr.summary: Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari demanda au Prophète qui était son successeur. Jibrîl apporta le message de Dieu: Ali ibn Abi Talib est l'exécuteur, successeur, protecteur du Bassin et porteur de l'étendard du Prophète.
fr.seo_question: Que dit le Prophète à propos d'Ali comme successeur lorsque Jabir posa la question ?

de.summary: Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari fragte den Propheten nach seinem Nachfolger. Jibreel brachte Gottes Botschaft, dass Ali ibn Abi Talib der Vollstrecker, Stellvertreter, Verteidiger des Beckens und Träger des Banners des Propheten ist.
de.seo_question: Was sagte der Prophet über Ali als seinen Nachfolger, als Jabir ihn fragte?

ru.summary: Джабир ибн Абдуллах аль-Ансари спросил Пророка о его преемнике. Джибриль принёс весть от Аллаха: Али ибн Абу Талиб — преемник, наместник, защитник Хауда и обладатель знамени Пророка.
ru.seo_question: Что сказал Пророк об Али как преемнике, когда Джабир спросил?

zh.summary: 贾比尔·本·阿卜杜拉·安萨里问先知关于他的继承人。吉卜利勒带来了安拉的信息：阿里·本·阿比·塔利卜是先知的继承人、代理人、池塘的守护者和旗帜的持有者。

key_terms.وصيّ: 瓦西——神圣命令的继承人

zh.seo_question: 当贾比尔问先知关于他的继承人时，先知关于阿里说了什么？

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو نَصْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ الْمُقْرِي قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الرَّازِيُّ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَنَفِيُّ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي يَحْيَى بْنُ هَاشِمٍ السِّمْسَارُ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ شِمْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادٌ، عَنْ أَبِي الزُّبَيْرِ، عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ حَرَامٍ الْأَنْصَارِيِّ قَالَ:

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو نَصْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ الْمُقْرِي
narrators.name_en: Abu Nasr Muhammad ibn al-Husayn al-Muqri
narrators.ambiguity_note: Likely Abu Nasr Muhammad ibn al-Husayn al-Muqri al-Baghdadi, a transmitter in Mufid's chains; limited biographical data available

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الرَّازِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Abu Abdillah al-Husayn ibn Ali al-Razi
narrators.ambiguity_note: Likely al-Husayn ibn Ali al-Razi, a narrator in late 4th-century AH Baghdadi circles; not to be confused with other Husayn ibn Ali narrators
Likely Ja'far ibn Muhammad al-Hanafi, a transmitter found in Amali chains; limited independent biographical attestation
Likely Yahya ibn Hashim al-Simsar (al-Ghassani), a narrator in Kufi chains; considered weak by some rijal scholars
Likely Amru ibn Shimr al-Ju'fi, a Kufi narrator who transmitted from Jabir al-Ju'fi; classified as weak (da'if) in most rijal sources
Multiple narrators named Hammad; could be Hammad ibn Isa or Hammad ibn Uthman
Likely Abu al-Zubayr Muhammad ibn Muslim ibn Tadrus al-Makki (d. 126 AH), well-known Meccan narrator from Jabir ibn Abdullah
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Muslim ibn Tadrus al-Makki

narrators.name_ar: جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ حَرَامٍ الْأَنْصَارِيِّ
narrators.name_en: Jabir ibn Abdullah ibn Harram al-Ansari
narrators.known_identity: Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari, prominent companion of the Prophet

key_phrases.phrase_en: May Allah bless him and his family and grant peace

similar_content_hints.description: The Hadith of Ghadir Khumm where the Prophet declared Ali as the mawla of the believers, similarly establishing divine appointment of Ali as the Prophet's successor.
Narrations about the Pool (al-Hawdh) in the afterlife and the Prophet warning that some will be turned away from it, found across multiple hadith collections.
The hadith of the banner (liwa) being carried by Ali on the Day of Judgement, reported in various Sunni and Shia collections as a virtue of Ali.
